title: Monday & Pipedrive CRM Integrations
excerpt:
Hi everyone. 
I have activated the integration between Monday and Pipedrive but not all the fields work as I would like. 
Is anyone already working with these two software? 
Thanks! :slight_smile:

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone.
I have activated the integration between Monday and Pipedrive but not all the fields work as I would like.

Is anyone already working with these two software?

Thanks!

posts.author: ErickE-monday.com (Erick E.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AleRun

Thanks for trying out our monday.com & PipeDrive CRM integration. Some fields are not supported in the integration, you can check out this article regarding the integration to see if the fields you are having difficulties with are supported: monday.com & PipeDrive

If the fields you are having difficulties with are supported, reach out to us at support@monday.com so we can help you troubleshoot, otherwise I’d love to learn about the fields you are working with so we can pass the suggestion to support them onto our integrations team.
